tools.name: audit_website_preview
tools.description: FREE PREVIEW (1 audit per day per IP) of Santos Website Intelligence. Runs a fast Quick Intelligence Audit of one public page: fetch timing, page weight, SEO, basic HTML accessibility, security headers, Website Intelligence dimensions, pass/fail checks, and remediation guidance. tools.name: audit_agent_readiness
tools.description: PAID CAPABILITY ($0.075 USDC per successful audit via x402 v2). Passively assesses how well a public website or service can be discovered, understood, invoked, and—where explicitly applicable—paid by agents. This MCP call validates the target and returns the canonical x402 HTTP handoff; payment and

tools.name: extract_page_markdown
tools.description: FREE PREVIEW (1 request per day per IP, quota shared with audit_website_preview) of Santos Page-to-Markdown extraction. Fetches one public page and returns its main content as clean Markdown plus title, description, outbound links, and word count. Single page only — no crawling or JavaScript renderi

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: audit_website_preview, audit_agent_readiness · Private data: audit_website_preview, audit_agent_readiness, extract_page_markdown · Public sink: extract_page_markdown.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: audit_website_preview, audit_agent_readiness · Private data: audit_website_preview, audit_agent_readiness, extract_page_markdown · Public sink: extract_page_markdown

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
